lines.lyric_hangul: Ooh-ah-ah, ah-ah, yeah
SEVENTEEN right here
lines.lyric_translation: SEVENTEEN right here

lines.lyric_hangul: 땅을 보고 계속 올랐지 정상까지
lines.lyric_translation: I looked at the ground and kept going to the top and

lines.lyric: Maneun shiryeoneun boran deushi I Always Win
lines.lyric_hangul: 많은 시련은 보란 듯이, I always win
lines.lyric_translation: Faced everything, like I’m so proud, I always win

lines.lyric_hangul: 강한 마음이 중요하지 (중요하지)
lines.lyric_translation: It’s key that you got a strong will

lines.lyric: Miraeneun domanggaji ana naega nohki jeonkkaji
lines.lyric_hangul: 미래는 도망가지 않아 내가 놓기 전까지
lines.lyric_translation: The future’s not going anywhere, not until I let go

lines.lyric_hangul: Da-rum-da-rim-da, 구름을 타고 여기저기로 (hey)
lines.lyric_translation: DARUMDARIMDA / hop on our cloud and get all around (hey)

lines.lyric_hangul: Da-rum-da-rim-da, 우리들의 긍지를 높이러 (hey)
lines.lyric_translation: DARUMDARIMDA / so that we can proudly stand tall (hey)

lines.lyric_hangul: Da-rum-da-rim-da, 또 다른 세계 나아가자, go
lines.lyric_translation: DARUMDARIMDA / let’s move on to the next world, go

lines.lyric_hangul: 이 rhythm에 맞춰
lines.lyric_translation: Catch this rhythm and flow

lines.lyric_hangul: Say, say, say, say 영웅본색 like this
lines.lyric_translation: Say Say Say Say / Hero’s true colors like this

lines.lyric_hangul: 시간과 공간에 구애받지 않는 자세, 자세
lines.lyric_translation: A stance of being free of all time and space

lines.lyric_hangul: 힘을 다하고 쓰러져도
lines.lyric_translation: If I give it my all and slip up

lines.lyric_hangul: 포기를 모르고 날뛰는 중
lines.lyric_translation: Don’t know how to give up, I’m running riot

lines.lyric_hangul: 마치 된 것 같아 손오공
lines.lyric_translation: Feels like I turned into SONOGONG / Feels like I turned into SONOGONG / Feels like I turned into SONOGONG

lines.lyric_hangul: 마치 된 것 같아 손오공
lines.lyric_translation: Feels like I turned into SONOGONG

lines.lyric: Urineun shwiji ana maeil, Make it Make it
lines.lyric_hangul: 우리는 쉬지 않아 매일, make it, make it
lines.lyric_translation: We’ll never rest, every day, Make it Make it

lines.lyric_hangul: 끝까지 가보자 (마치 된 것 같아 손오공)
lines.lyric_translation: Don’t break till we make it

lines.lyric_hangul: I love my team, I love my crew, 여기까지 달리면서
lines.lyric_translation: I love my team, I love my crew / We already made it this far

parts.lyric: I Luv My Team I Luv My Crew

lines.lyric_hangul: I love my team, I love my crew, 계속 달릴 수 있어 더
lines.lyric_translation: I love my team, I love my crew / We can keep running forever more

parts.lyric: I Luv My Team I Luv My Crew

lines.lyric_hangul: I love my team, I love my crew, 여기까지 오르면서
lines.lyric_translation: I love my team, I love my crew / We already made it this high

parts.lyric: I Luv My Team I Luv My Crew

lines.lyric: I Luv My Team geu deokbune urin
lines.lyric_hangul: I love my team, 그 덕분에 우린 (마치 된 것 같아 손오공)
lines.lyric_translation: I love my team, it’s all thanks to you

lines.lyric_hangul: 알리지 우리는 등장 중 (중), 여전히 세대를 뒤바꿈 (꿈)
lines.lyric_translation: Listen up, we’re on our way now / Switching up the generation till now

lines.lyric_hangul: 멈추지 않아 뜀박 중 (중), 발이 꼬여도 뒷박 (brrr) 쿵
lines.lyric_translation: We’re not stopping, we’re racing now / Misstep or not, the backbeat still goes pow

lines.lyric: WOO WOO Pull Up My geunduun
lines.lyric_hangul: Ooh, ooh, pull up my 근두운
lines.lyric_translation: WOO WOO, pull up on my flying cloud

lines.lyric_hangul: Ooh, ooh, 성실히 수행 중
lines.lyric_translation: WOO WOO, be a hard worker now

lines.lyric_hangul: Da-rum-da-rim-da, 늘어나라 하늘로 여의봉 (hey)
lines.lyric_translation: DARUMDARIMDA / rise way up to the sky, power pole (hey)

lines.lyric_hangul: Da-rum-da-rim-da, 우리들의 매일은 come and go (hey)
lines.lyric_translation: DARUMDARIMDA / every day we always come and go (hey)

lines.lyric_hangul: Da-rum-da-rim-da, 모든 걸 위해 나아가자, go
lines.lyric_translation: DARUMDARIMDA / let’s move for the sake of it all, go

lines.lyric_hangul: 이 노래에 맞춰
lines.lyric_translation: Catch this music and flow

lines.lyric_translation: Say Say Say Say / Hero’s true colors like this

lines.lyric_translation: Feels like I turned into SONOGONG

lines.lyric_hangul: 진실은 때론 잔혹해 (what's that?)
lines.lyric_translation: Sometimes the truth hurts (What’s that?)

lines.lyric_hangul: 거짓은 때론 달콤해 (what's that?)
lines.lyric_translation: Sometimes the lie’s sweet (What’s that?)

lines.lyric_hangul: 다정함은 때론 거짓말로 (what's that?)
lines.lyric_translation: Sometimes kind’s a kind of lie (What’s that?)

lines.lyric_hangul: 나쁜 것 싹 다 모아둬 (ping하고 불 나와)
lines.lyric_translation: Shove all the bad stuff together / Ping and out comes fire

lines.lyric: Ener Energy gi moa aju da nawa
lines.lyric_hangul: Ener-energy, 기 모아 아주 다 나와
lines.lyric_translation: Ener-energy, gather your strength and out comes power

lines.lyric: Ener Energy hanbange aju balsa pa
lines.lyric_hangul: Ener-energy, 한방에 아주 발사 파
lines.lyric_translation: Ener-energy, one massive shot

lines.lyric: Jigeumbuteo da haneul wiro hamseong balsa
lines.lyric_hangul: 지금부터 다 하늘 위로 함성 발사
lines.lyric_translation: Now let’s all aim our cries up to the sky

lines.lyric_hangul: 이 노래는 이 만화의 엔딩송이다
lines.lyric_translation: This is the cartoon’s credits song
